title: Kumbakonam Santhayil Song Lyrics Simmarasi
stanzas:
Kumbakoanam sandhayil
paartha chinna penthaana
manja thaavani kaathula parakka
vandha penthaanaa

vandhavaasi roadula nethu
vandha aalthaanaa!
konjam paarthu nenjula serndha
sondha aalthaanaa

vettiyin vegatha paarthu
un dhavani verthadhu nethu
vetkatha eda vachi potu
nan vetiya theikiren
saluga kaattu

Kumbakoanam.....
Kumbakoanam sandhayil
paartha chinna penthaana
manja thaavani kaathula parakka
vandha penthaanaa

Thanni thookura thanga rathame
unna thookkida varalaamaa(2)
thanni paanaiga vacha edatha
maaman paarvaiga thodalaama

adi kulungudhu iduppu
kulirudhu neruppu
pakkam vandhu thodalaama
ada vepilai iruku mapila unakku
mandhirichu vidalaama

neththi verthirichu
aasa kaathirukku
unna jaadayil ketkuren
sammadham sollamma

Kumbakoanam sandhayil
paartha chinna penthaana
manja thaavani kaathula parakka
vandha penthaanaa

Kalla kaattula kattil irukku
kammankool kondu varuvayaa!(2)
yezhu thalamura thottil irukka
enna seekkiram viduvaayaa!

adi meththa veedu onnu naan
kattitharen unaku
kannam konjam tharuvaayaa

simrasikku ippo
uchcham aayirachu
kanni rasiya kavukkanum
neratha sollammaa

Kumbakoanam sandhayil
paartha chinna penthaana
manja thaavani kaathula parakka
vandha penthaanaa

vandhavaasi roadula nethu
vandha aalthaanaa!
konjam paarthu nenjula serndha
sondha aalthaanaa

vettiyin vegatha paarthu
un dhavani verthadhu nethu
vetkatha eda vachi potu
nan vetiya theikiren
saluga kaattu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kumbakonam Santhayil?

The song captures a lively and romantic encounter in a bustling marketplace.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Arunmozhi and Sujatha Mohan.

Who composed the music for Simmarasi?

The music for the movie was composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 19, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kumbakonam Santhayil from the movie Simmarasi is a lively and romantic duet that takes place in a bustling marketplace. Sung by Arunmozhi and Sujatha Mohan, it conveys a playful and joyous interaction between the characters. The lyrics describe a charming encounter, filled with vibrant imagery and emotions. S.A. Rajkumar's composition enhances the song's peppy and celebratory mood, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kumbakonam Santhayil from the movie Simmarasi. This delightful duet, featuring the voices of Arunmozhi and Sujatha Mohan, captures the essence of a bustling marketplace with its peppy and romantic vibes. Let S.A. Rajkumar's melodious composition transport you to a world of joy and celebration.
stanzaMeanings: In the Kumbakonam market, I saw a young girl in a yellow saree, flying in the wind.
On Vandavasi road, someone came yesterday. I looked a bit and felt a connection.
Seeing the speed of the wind, your saree fluttered yesterday. I am teasing you, show some shyness.
Golden chariot carrying water, can I come to lift you? Can I touch the place where the water pots are kept?
Your waist is shaking, the fire is cooling. Can I come close and touch? There are betel leaves, can I enchant you?
The forehead is shining, the breeze of desire is waiting. I am asking for your consent.
There is a bed in the forest, will you bring the comfort? There is a cradle of seven generations, will you release it soon?
I will build a soft house for you, will you give me a little cheek?
For that house, will you join both lips as the door?
It's peak time for Simmarasi, the young girl should be tied. Tell me the time.
On Vandavasi road, someone came yesterday. I looked a bit and felt a connection.
Seeing the speed of the wind, your saree fluttered yesterday. I am teasing you, show some shyness.
